title: Cronos Group Reports 2024 Third Quarter Results
text: Cronos Group reported Q3 2024 results with consolidated net revenue of $34.3 million, a 38% increase from prior year and surpassing analyst estimate of $29.10 million. Net revenue excluding GrowCo was $30 million, representing 21% stand-alone growth. GrowCo contributed $4.3 million in net revenue. Gross profit was $3.6 million equating to 11% gross margin. Adjusted gross profit was $10.7 million equating to 31% adjusted gross margin. Adjusted EBITDA of $(6.0) million improved by $9.2 million year-over-year, driven by higher net revenue, improved adjusted gross profit, and decreased general and administrative expenses. Spinach brand achieved number one ranked cannabis brand position in Canadian market with 4.8% market share. Cronos announced additional $51 million credit facility to support GrowCo expansion. Company obtained majority control of GrowCo board and consolidated GrowCo results beginning Q3 2024. Construction of expanded facilities progressing, with completion expected Q2 2025.
